description_long: This is a large, black-figure Greek-style vase with a wide mouth and a rounded, tapering body. The exterior is adorned with intricate ochre-colored illustrations depicting mythological figures, including warriors in armor, a crowned woman, and a winged figure, all set against a deep black background. The rim and base are subtly decorated with geometric borders, while the main body features detailed narrative scenes with expressive postures and period-accurate attire. The surface appears to be ceramic, with a matte to slightly glossy finish, and the artwork is finely executed, suggesting a high level of craftsmanship. The vase is hollow, with a wide opening suitable for holding flowers, liquids, or as a decorative centerpiece. Its overall condition appears well-preserved, with no visible cracks or chips.
description: A large, black-figure Greek-style ceramic vase featuring detailed ochre illustrations of mythological figures and geometric borders. The surface is well-preserved and artistically decorated.
description_view_0: This view highlights a crowned woman and a helmeted warrior facing each other, with intricate details in their attire and shields.
description_view_1: This side shows a central armored warrior with a large round shield, flanked by another figure holding a spear.
description_view_2: This angle reveals a winged figure between two standing individuals, emphasizing the mythological theme.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the interaction between a spear-wielding figure and a shield-bearing warrior, with dynamic postures.
attribute_pattern: figural narrative scenes with geometric borders
